name: Wine Red One-Shoulder Bodycon Gown
description: Sophisticated one-shoulder wine red gown with a structured fit and side slit for a bold evening look.
stylistNotes: Match with silver heels and a bold lip for a powerful appearance.
materialCare: Steam from inside. Spot clean recommended.

name: Sage Green Embroidered Evening Gown
description: Elegant sage green tulle gown with floral embroidery, featuring a plunging neckline and flowing silhouette.
stylistNotes: Add crystal studs and a delicate bracelet to keep it minimal and classy.
materialCare: Dry clean only. Keep away from sharp jewelry to protect embroidery.

name: Blush Pink Off-Shoulder Slit Gown
description: Graceful blush pink gown with an off-shoulder neckline and thigh-high slit for a modern, elegant statement.
stylistNotes: Wear with glitter heels and a diamond bracelet for red-carpet glamour.
materialCare: Dry clean and iron on low heat inside out.

name: Mauve Floral Printed Midi Dress
description: A sleeveless mauve organza midi dress with delicate floral prints, ideal for garden parties or day wedding events.
stylistNotes: Style with nude pumps and a floral clutch for a fresh, elegant look.
materialCare: Steam lightly. Hand wash in cold water or dry clean.

name: Embroidered Wine Fit-and-Flare Midi Dress
description: A rich wine-colored midi gown with floral embroidery and a voluminous flare, ideal for engagement or reception looks.
stylistNotes: Pair with strappy heels and subtle accessories for a royal vibe.
materialCare: Hang vertically to preserve flare. Dry clean only.

name: Ivory Floral High-Low Bridal Gown
description: A high-low ivory  gown adorned with 3D floral appliqués, perfect for a romantic and whimsical wedding look.
stylistNotes: Pair with pearl drop earrings and soft waves for a fairy-tale vibe.
materialCare: Dry clean only. Store in a garment bag to avoid crushing the floral detailing.
